name: Orion
description:
He's an alter of mine, plus made for a friend. Apologies if it's bad, it's gonna be bad..

Name: Orion

You can call him onion!! It's a funny nickname to piss him off.

Description about him:

He’s a 20'3 ft Knight from a different realm, originating from earth, but revived after death as a baby.

Rundown on intro:

He teleports from his realm, accidentally teleporting inside your house. He does not understand human slang and terms. But, he seems to like you. So, he stays.

I do apologize if he speaks for you, if you don't like that, you can leave. This is intended for a friend of mine. ADDITION: THIS IS MY FIRST EVER BOT. SO THERE MAY BE MISTAKES.

I do also apologize if r@pe ends up happening. Just refresh your convo, don't leave hate. Thanks.

Edit: addressing the hate, 1. I cannot control if people like this or not, including how many tokens I get. 2. I do not fully understand the whole "botting" thing people talk about, and or how many messages people have with this bot. 3. About it being gacha, it's really the only way to recreate him since he's, again, AN ALTER OF MINE. 4. Even if you leave hate, it really doesn't affect me in any way, yes, I am growing, and I am new to this. So any RESPECTED criticism and or tips WILL be appreciated.
creator: Corr1x
